case_title: FIREMAN'S FUND INSURANCE COMPANY, A CORPORATION vs. VELASQUEZ, RAFAEL et al

docket_entries.description: PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF FIREMAN'S FUND INSURANCE COMPANY, A CORPORATION AS TO DEFENDANT VELASQUEZ, RAFAEL DOES 1 THROUGH 10 SUMMONS ISSUED STATUS CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR          MAY-22-1998 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  MAR-23-1998 STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT DUE ON       MAY-04-1998

JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED.

STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF MAY-22-1998, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO SERVE DEFENDANT AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE WITHIN 60 DAYS OF FILING OF COMPLAINT, TO FILE A STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT WITHIN 20 CALENDAR DAYS OF STATUS CONFERENCE DATE (LOCAL RULE 303E4), OSC TO PLTF'S ATTY MICHAEL V MAHONEY. FURTHER RESPONSE TO ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FILED BY PLAINTIFF ATTORNEY

OSC AND SANCTION AGAINST PLTF'S ATTY MICHAEL V MAHONEY, WHO IS REQUIRED TO FILE STATUS STATEMENT 20 DAYS PRIOR TO HEARING., PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE JUL-16-1998 CONTINUED FROM JUL-01-1998 TO JUL-29-1998 AT 02:30 PM NOTICE SENT BY COURT
